Surname.jp: プールのトリックスター

dungeon.jp: 飛天の塔【ベリーハード】1階

name.jp: スパークリングウォーターボム

description.en: (Passive Effect) Cannot be inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color>, <color=#28d9ed>Frozen</color>, <color=#28d9ed>Petrified</color>, <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color>, or <color=#28d9ed>Silenced</color>, and grants an irremovable <color=#28d9ed>Invulnerability</color> to the caster.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果) <color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>、<color=#28d9ed>凍結</color>、<color=#28d9ed>石化</color>、<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>、<color=#28d9ed>沈黙</color>の影響を受けず、自分に解除不可能な<color=#28d9ed>無敵</color>を付与する。
description.kr: (패시브 효과) <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color>, <color=#28d9ed>빙결</color>, <color=#28d9ed>석화</color>, <color=#28d9ed>도발</color>, <color=#28d9ed>침묵</color>의 영향을 받지 않고, 자신에게 해제 불가능한 <color=#28d9ed>무적</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)不受到<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>、<color=#28d9ed>冰冻</color>、<color=#28d9ed>石化</color>、<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>、<color=#28d9ed>沉默</color>的影响,自身获得无法被解除的<color=#28d9ed>无敌</color>效果。
